title: Moons Short Swords
description: This pack changes the ugly 1.8.9 swords to be much smaller and easier for PVP
body:
this pack changes the ugly 1.8.9 swords to be much smaller and easier on the eyes. it comes with all the sword types, and a compatabuility with almost all texture packs


thanks "coolgay69" for helping me get the screenshots without getting killed
